name: ssh-harness
description: Allowlist-driven Claude Code plugin for safe SSH diagnostics.

plugins.name: ssh-harness
plugins.description: Allowlist-driven SSH harness for Claude Code, bundling an MCP server, skills, and hooks. Every diagnostic is a typed, audited, read-only YAML rule — the LLM cannot type free-form SSH commands. spawnSync with no shell, Zod-strict params, fail-closed audit log.
